landing.headline: UraChara AI
landing.subheadline: Ready to expose your hidden side?
landing.description:
Your SNS posts, hobbies, music taste...
AI reveals the gap between your public face and your secret self.
landing.trustSignal: 🔒 No data stored. Auto-deleted after diagnosis.

hidden.title: Couch Potato Who Can't Leave Bed

prompts.snsContent: Copy-paste your recent SNS posts. Twitter, Instagram, anything goes!
prompts.hobbies: Tell us what you're into, what you love!
prompts.schedule: Walk us through your typical day.
prompts.musicTaste: What artists or songs do you listen to?
prompts.firstImpression: How do you think people see you?

placeholders.snsContent: e.g.: Working from a cafe today ☕ / Weekend drinks with friends 🍻 / This movie made me cry 😭
placeholders.hobbies: e.g.: Into solo camping lately. Binge-watching K-dramas on Netflix. Weekend gym sessions.
placeholders.schedule: e.g.: Wake up 7am → packed train → work 9-6 → gym → home → fall asleep watching YouTube
placeholders.musicTaste: e.g.: Taylor Swift, The Weeknd, Doja Cat. Late night lo-fi playlists. Secretly love anime OSTs.
placeholders.firstImpression: e.g.: People say I'm "put together" but I'm actually scrambling every morning.

helpText.snsContent: 5-10 posts is ideal. More posts = better accuracy!
helpText.hobbies: Public hobbies AND secret guilty pleasures — write them all!
helpText.schedule: Your REAL day, not your ideal one!
helpText.musicTaste: Genres, artists, playlist vibes — anything goes!
helpText.firstImpression: Things people often say about you, nicknames, first impressions, etc.

validationErrors.snsContentRequired: SNS posts are required! They're the key to finding your hidden self!
validationErrors.hobbiesRequired: Hobbies are required! We can't find your hidden side without knowing what you love!
validationErrors.snsContentMinLength: Write a bit more so we can find your hidden self! ({remaining} more chars)
validationErrors.hobbiesMinLength: Tell us more about your hobbies! ({remaining} more chars)

teaserMessages: Your posts reveal a surprising side...
The gap might be bigger than you think...?
Your hidden self is about to be revealed...

share.title: Share Card
share.shareTextTemplate: My hidden persona is "{hiddenTitle}"! Gap Score: {gapScore} pts

footer.privacy: No data stored. Auto-deleted after diagnosis.

apiErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
apiErrors.validationFailed: There's a problem with your input.
apiErrors.analysisNotReady: Analysis feature is getting ready. Please wait a moment.
apiErrors.resultNotFound: Analysis result not found. Please try again.
apiErrors.lostInSearch: We got lost while searching for your hidden self... Let's try again!

meta.tagline: We're about to expose your hidden character.
meta.title: UraChara AI - Ready to expose your hidden side?
meta.description: Your SNS posts, hobbies, music taste... AI reveals the gap between your public face and your secret self.
meta.ogDescription: Ready to expose your hidden side?

honest.label: Open Book
honest.description: What you see is what you get. Barely any gap.

slight.label: Slight Gap
slight.description: A small gap — you adapt subtly to your surroundings.

dual.label: Double Life
dual.description: You know how to read the room. Two distinct sides.

moe.label: Gap Appeal
moe.description: Major gap between your public and private self. The contrast is charming.

extreme.label: Totally Different Person
extreme.description: Your public and private selves are total strangers. Double agent vibes.
